name: Organizational Restructuring Intake
description: Organizational restructuring intake for companies undergoing workforce reduction, reporting line redesign, business unit consolidation, or leadership layer removal. Evaluates restructuring rationale, design logic, legal exposure, communication sequencing, talent retention risk, and readiness to produce a restructuring profile with gap analysis, risk flags, and recommended pre-execution actions.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.

types.name: Restructuring Profile
types.description: Generated restructuring profile from intake session data.
